title: DevHarness Reviewer Selection Output
description: Worker output envelope for DevHarness stages that must declare reviewer selection state without triggering runtime routing or fan-out.

outcome.description: Machine-readable stage outcome used by workflow routing.
outcome.x-usage: Downstream next/match logic reads this value; choose only the enum/const value that matches the stage state.

artifacts.description: Optional structured artifacts emitted by this stage.
artifacts.x-usage: Use for named files or durable handoff artifacts the orchestrator should preserve.

results.description: Optional structured result summaries emitted by this stage.
results.x-usage: Use for compact machine-readable evidence or decisions that should remain in baton state.

blocker.description: Blocker details required when the stage cannot produce a usable contract.
blocker.x-usage: Populate when outcome is blocked so the orchestrator can stop and ask for the missing input or decision.

reviewers.description: Reviewer selections with reason, surfaces, and required flag.
reviewers.x-usage: Keep one entry per selected review step so runtime and humans can audit why each reviewer runs.

review_plan.description: Planner-owned review contract describing required reviewers and surfaces.
review_plan.x-usage: Review dispatch uses this to fan out review work; reviewers use it to understand their required scope.

reason.description: Reason this reviewer or step is needed.

surfaces.description: Code, contract, docs, data, or UX surfaces this reviewer must inspect.

required.description: Whether this reviewer is mandatory for completion.
